character.feel: Dense, professional project management tool with a dark-first aesthetic. Minimal shadows, pill-shaped buttons, tight 32px control heights, and a muted neutral palette punctuated by a single purple accent. The UI is information-dense but never cluttered.

iconography.library: Custom SVG icons (Linear-specific), closest to Lucide
iconography.never: No emojis in UI chrome, no filled icons, no multi-color icons. Color dots for labels/priorities only.

button.note: Pill-shaped. Primary = purple accent fill. Very compact.

button-secondary.note: Pill-shaped outline button with subtle shadow.

input.note: Compact 32px height. Search inputs have icon padding-left 32px.

card.note: Cards use subtle border, no shadow. Settings sections use card-like containers.

table-row.note: Very compact rows. Issue list uses ~36px rows.

badge.note: Minimal badges. Status badges like 'Admin' use accent purple color, no background.

sidebar-item.note: Compact 28px items. Active state uses subtle bg highlight.

tab.note: Pill-style tabs with filled background on active. Used for issue filters (All/Active/Backlog).

modal.note: Create issue modal is clean with title input + description area + bottom toolbar.

command-palette.note: Cmd+K palette with search input, grouped results, keyboard navigation.

switch.note: Standard toggle switch. Active = accent purple.

h3.note: Section headers in settings are actually h3 at 13px
